# AKSHAR Tactical Typing Engine

AKSHAR is a high-performance, real-time multiplayer typing battle platform set in an industrial-tactical universe with deep Indian lore.

## Technical Core
- **Distributed State**: Real-time room synchronization using Firebase Realtime Database.
- **Optimistic UI**: Sub-100ms typing feedback loop with client-side prediction.
- **Typing Engine**: Strategic character-level validation with support for multi-language Devanagari numerals.
- **Architecture**: Next.js 15 (App Router), Tailwind CSS, Firebase (Auth/DB/Analytics).

## Lore & World Building
- **Theme**: Sand & Amber tactical aesthetic.
- **Setting**: Near-future Jaisalmer, Rajasthan.
- **Entity**: AKSHAR (अक्षर) — A high-frequency signal processing faction.
- **Agents**: 8 unique operatives (e.g., Agni, Bijli, Chhaya) each with strategic combat abilities.

## Key Terminology
- **Operative**: A player profile with tracked career stats (WPM, Accuracy).
- **Protocol**: A typing mission/prompt category (Tech, Lore, Code).
- **Tactical Ability**: Game-changing effects deployed during races (Blurs, Scrambles, Locks).

## Primary Access Points
- **Deployment Hub (Home)**: https://akshar19.vercel.app/
- **Tactical Archives (Lore)**: https://akshar19.vercel.app/lore
- **Mission Briefing (Guide)**: https://akshar19.vercel.app/guide
- **Operative Dashboard**: https://akshar19.vercel.app/dashboard / https://akshar19.vercel.app/agents

## Purpose
Mastery of high-speed tactical communication and strategic precision.
